title: Create Love and War
description: Integration of Create mod and survival friendly war elements to create an Immersive Create and Combat Expirience almost exclusively enjoyed with friends!
body: Create Love and War is a modpack featuring Create with Electricity Integration and many Quality of Life Features, It is designed in a Semi-Realistic and Steampunk Style with Cold Cruelty and Joyful Creation in mind. Being a Combat focused Modpack it also allows for more laid back and enjoyable Expirience. Many sleepless nights have gone into this pack and I hope you can enjoy it as much as I do.
